_comment_fields: Plan 04a ships configuration files only — it does NOT wire the daemon to discover or consume this file. Plan 04b is responsible for daemon-side discovery of agent-config.json and crons.json, cron registration, agent spawn via PTY, prompt dispatch, and the ndjsonAlert envelope contract used by the fallback path in prompt-template.md step (d). The authProfile, cwd, org, and env fields below are inputs 04b must forward to the PTY spawn opts. If 04b reads from a different source, these values will silently rot.
_comment_autoStart: autoStart is documentational in this file — the auto-start loop in main.ts reads from DaemonConfig.agents[], not from agent-config.json.
